6.reason: gets() is removed in the C11 standard and causes compilation errors in modern compilers; use fgets(p1, sizeof(p1), stdin) instead.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  gets() is removed in the C11 standard and causes compilation errors in modern compilers; use fgets(p1, sizeof(p1), stdin) instead.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [The function 'gets' is unsafe and has been removed from the C standard library since C11. It can cause buffer overflow and leads to compilation errors with modern compilers that do not support it. Use 'fgets' instead.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [The function 'gets' is unsafe and has been removed from the C standard library since C11. It can cause buffer overflow and leads to compilation errors with modern compilers that do not support it. Use 'fgets' instead.]
